result: {"verdict": "approve", "reasons": ["Probe confirms anonymous request returns HTTP 403 via Drupal's access denied; 'view healthstats' permission defined in hook_permission and wired via access arguments", "Authorized page callback emits exactly {\"users\":1,\"nodes\":13} — correct shape, ints, counting only status=1 users (uid 0 excluded, status 0) and published nodes", "drupal_json_output() is D7's native JSON delivery (sets Content-Type: application/json); no print+exit — returning NULL is correct here, drupal_deliver_html_page ignores NULL and the response is not truncated", "php -l passes (probe gates on it); module enables cleanly, D7-idiomatic hook_menu/hook_permission, parameterized db_query, correct 2-space indentation and doc comments"]}
